role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic cues (no signs) and abstained from analysis.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Peru. The agents adhered strictly to their domains, providing consistent evidence regarding the arid landscape and specific construction styles (cinder block walls, concrete poles) that point to the Peruvian coast. The tournament logic correctly prioritized the strongest evidence (Peru vs Mexico) to reach the right conclusion.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of arid soil and mountains match image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of scrub vegetation match image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of poles and walls match image.
